sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78329" key="para/limnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παράλιμνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n78329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lying by lakes</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">marshes</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.951f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
